close_notes.mappedValue: This incident is resolved. The linked alert has now cleared.
This incident is resolved. The linked alert has now de-escalated to Warning/Indeterminate.

work_notes.format: Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. The Alert escalated to Critical, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. The Alert escalated to Major/Error, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. The Alert de-escalated to Warning/Indeterminate (Suppressed). As per the configured decision drivers, the incident is resolved. Current Alert Severity: %8$s (2: Warning; 1: Indeterminate) The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. The Alert is in cleared State. As per the configured decision drivers, the incident is resolved. The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. The Alert is Active and the alert is severity above Warning. Please review the alert for more details. Current Alert Severity: %8$s (5: Critical; 4: Major) The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Alert updated by Edwin [code] Alert [/code]. Current Alert Severity: %8$s (5: Critical; 4: Major; 2: Warning; 1: Indeterminate; 0: Clear) The alert state is %2$s. The number of de-duplicated events is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

work_notes.format: Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight escalated to Critical, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight escalated to Major/Error, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight is in cleared State, and all correlated alerts are now cleared. As per the configured decision drivers, the incident is being automatically resolved. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT.
